C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review confirmed the six-entity contract shell, TEN-001..TEN-008 acceptance/anchor preservation, NARR-018 decision accounting, weighted/H00 wiring, and evidence chain. No P0/P1 findings; three P3 notes.

findings.title: NARR-018 unresolved decision records carry symbolic blocked_claim_refs
findings.details: Unresolved NARR-018 terms route to symbolic blocked_claim refs because BlockedClaim is still a contract-shell entity. Each unresolved term has status, target_rp, owner, and blocked_claim_ref, so unresolved decisions are not promoted to implementation authority.
findings.recommendation: Instantiate each referenced BlockedClaim or resolve the term before the dependent target RP closes.

findings.title: weighted_title_disposition defers to RP00.P00.M10.S01, which carries the generic generator label
findings.details: Weighted ledger titles remain generic Scope inventory labels while IDs, source_micro_phase_id, requirement refs, and H00/C00 refs are authoritative and correct.
findings.recommendation: When RP00.P00.M10.S01 is worked, confirm the generator emits per-subphase titles or update the deferral target.

findings.title: Recorded finding line anchors drifted from current contract layout
findings.details: The older review result cited line 543 for weighted_title_disposition, which now starts around line 564. This is evidence-hygiene only.
findings.recommendation: Refresh line anchors in regenerated review evidence.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed. No P0/P1 findings; P2 findings, if any, are absent; P3 notes are recorded in adjudication and do not block this subphase.

review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
